name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that keeps your slides looking sharp, not synthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce generic, over-designed slides that feel templated and soulless, undermining credibility in professional settings. Chronicle 2.0 aims to give users AI-powered efficiency without sacrificing design quality or personal voice. It targets teams and individuals who need polished decks fast but refuse to look like they used a chatbot.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with a refined, human-crafted aesthetic
Creating internal business presentations without heavy design overhead
Producing client-facing proposals that maintain brand consistency
Rapidly iterating on slide structures using AI while retaining editorial control
